title: Minimal Slider
summary: A lightweight slider pattern that uses native scroll snapping and a tiny enhancement script.

description.main: Use the minimal slider object for touch-first, keyboard-friendly horizontal galleries. The example exposes animation and slides-per-view controls so behavior can be tuned without heavy dependencies.

attributes.class: Base class and element classes for viewport, track, slide, controls and toolbar.

description.heading: Interactive minimal slider
description.description: Screen reader support, keyboard navigation, touch scrolling, and selectable animation styles.

animationVariants.title: Animation Variants
animationVariants.description: Set data-animation on .o-minimal-slider to switch visual behavior while preserving native scroll interaction.

data-animation=\"slide\".description: Subtle directional motion for off-screen slides.

data-animation=\"lift\".description: Active slide lifts with a stronger shadow.
